title: ophrys oestrifera subsp. bicornis
intro: Ophrys oestrifera subsp. bicornis, also known as the Bee Orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the Ophrys genus and is native to Europe and the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ophrys oestrifera subsp. bicornis include its ability to soothe and calm the respiratory system, relieve congestion, and aid in the relief of coughs and sore throats. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and infusions, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
